framework.name: Microagents Architecture Pattern
framework.description: A software architecture for autonomous agents featuring: Agent class (send/receive messages), Bureau class (agent registry and communication manager), Context object (agent runtime environment), Identity module (cryptographic operations), and Message models (structured communication). Agents operate with periodic behaviors and event-driven message handlers.
framework.raw_quote: the bureau class which is a not class provided by the microagents library and which represents a collection of agents and margin and manages their communication
